agentIds.note: All three consumers invoke the Somnia LLM Inference base agent (agentId discovered from https://agents.testnet.somnia.network). Each contract embeds its own system prompt and allowedValues so the same model returns the right verdict shape.

rebuildNotes: Phase A rebuild against the real Somnia Agents platform. AgentClient now passes (callbackAddress, callbackSelector) into createRequest; full 6-field Response and 16-field Request structs; ResponseStatus { None, Pending, Success, Failed, TimedOut }; PolicyManager calls ILLMInference.inferNumber, IncidentResolver and SentinelRegistry call ILLMInference.inferString with constrained allowedValues.
